subject: bge ca (when are you coming back?)

emails.subject: RE: BGE CA (When are you coming back?)
emails.subject_base: BGE CA (When are you coming back?)
emails.body: RE: BGE CA (When are you coming back?) Kay. I suggest we: (i) change the choice of law from Maryland to New York; (ii) add an arbitration clause; and (iii) shorten the time from two years to one year. I am attaching a redline of these changes and one with these changes accepted.
